executive_summary.summary: This report provides a general assessment of a business's digital presence using common industry best practices. It identifies key areas that typically impact online visibility, customer engagement, lead generation, and overall business growth.
executive_summary.current_state: The business has an existing digital presence but may have opportunities to improve its website, branding, search visibility, marketing consistency, and customer engagement.
executive_summary.opportunities: Growth opportunities include strengthening the website, improving SEO, maintaining consistent social media activity, optimizing Google Business Profile, implementing AI-powered customer support, and increasing brand awareness.
executive_summary.major_risks: Without a strong digital strategy, businesses may experience lower online visibility, reduced customer engagement, fewer qualified leads, and slower business growth.

business_overview.business_idea: A business providing products or services to its target customers.
business_overview.target_audience: Potential customers based on the business niche.
business_overview.revenue_model: Product sales, services, subscriptions, bookings, or other applicable business models.

current_business_status.website_presence: The business may have a website or digital presence that could benefit from performance, usability, and content improvements.
current_business_status.marketing_presence: Marketing efforts exist but may require greater consistency and strategic planning.
current_business_status.social_media_presence: Social media accounts may benefit from regular posting, improved branding, and stronger customer engagement.
current_business_status.search_engine_visibility: SEO optimization may be required to improve search rankings and online discoverability.
current_business_status.brand_awareness: There are opportunities to strengthen brand identity, credibility, and customer trust.
current_business_status.digital_maturity: The business has a developing digital presence with room for further optimization and automation.

pain_points.business_challenges: Limited digital visibility, inconsistent online presence, and customer acquisition challenges are common areas for improvement.
pain_points.marketing_challenges: Inconsistent content marketing, limited audience reach, and low engagement can reduce business growth.
pain_points.website_challenges: Website performance, user experience, mobile responsiveness, and conversion optimization may require attention.
pain_points.seo_challenges: Improving on-page SEO, keyword optimization, local SEO, and technical SEO can increase visibility.
pain_points.branding_challenges: A stronger and more consistent brand identity can improve recognition and customer trust.
pain_points.lead_generation_challenges: Businesses often benefit from better lead capture systems, conversion optimization, and customer follow-up automation.

risk_assessment.major_risks: Limited digital optimization may result in reduced online visibility, lower engagement, and missed business opportunities.
risk_assessment.business_threats: Increasing competition makes a strong digital presence essential for sustainable growth.
risk_assessment.digital_risks: Weak SEO, inconsistent marketing, and outdated digital assets can negatively affect customer acquisition.
risk_assessment.market_risks: Businesses that fail to adapt to digital trends may lose market share to more digitally mature competitors.
risk_assessment.mitigation_strategies: Focus on website optimization, SEO improvements, consistent content marketing, AI automation, and customer engagement strategies.

competitor_analysis.competitor_landscape: Most industries have increasing digital competition, making online differentiation important.
competitor_analysis.major_competitors: Competitors vary depending on the business industry and location.
competitor_analysis.competitor_strengths: Successful competitors typically maintain strong branding, active marketing, quality websites, and effective SEO strategies.
competitor_analysis.competitor_weaknesses: Many competitors still struggle with customer engagement, content consistency, and automation.
competitor_analysis.competitive_advantages: Businesses can stand out through better customer experience, consistent branding, digital marketing, and AI-powered automation.
competitor_analysis.competitive_gaps: Improving online presence and customer communication creates opportunities to outperform competitors.
competitor_analysis.missed_opportunities: Leveraging SEO, content marketing, social media, and automation can significantly improve business growth.

market_positioning.current_market_position: The business operates in a competitive market where digital presence strongly influences customer decisions.
market_positioning.industry_standing: Success depends on maintaining a professional online presence and delivering a strong customer experience.
market_positioning.online_visibility: Improved SEO and digital marketing can significantly increase business discoverability.
market_positioning.brand_positioning: Consistent branding and messaging help establish trust and long-term customer relationships.

swot_analysis.strengths: Existing digital presence, business operations, and opportunities for scalable growth.
swot_analysis.weaknesses: Potential gaps in SEO, branding, website optimization, and digital marketing consistency.
swot_analysis.opportunities: Expand online visibility, improve customer engagement, automate communication, and strengthen digital marketing efforts.
swot_analysis.threats: Growing competition and changing customer expectations require continuous digital improvement.

growth_opportunities.website: Improve website speed, mobile responsiveness, navigation, and conversion optimization.
growth_opportunities.seo: Implement technical SEO, keyword optimization, and content improvements.
growth_opportunities.local_seo: Optimize Google Business Profile and local search visibility.
growth_opportunities.social_media: Maintain a consistent posting schedule with engaging content and short-form videos.
growth_opportunities.branding: Develop a stronger brand identity and consistent visual communication.
growth_opportunities.content_marketing: Publish valuable educational and promotional content regularly.
growth_opportunities.customer_acquisition: Improve lead generation strategies through optimized landing pages and customer funnels.
growth_opportunities.lead_generation: Implement lead capture forms, AI chatbot assistance, and follow-up systems.
growth_opportunities.automation: Use AI chatbots, AI voice support, CRM automation, and workflow automation to improve efficiency.

priority_action_plan.priority_1: Improve website performance, user experience, and mobile responsiveness.
priority_action_plan.priority_2: Strengthen SEO to improve online visibility.
priority_action_plan.priority_3: Maintain consistent social media content and customer engagement.
priority_action_plan.priority_4: Implement AI-powered customer communication and automation.
priority_action_plan.priority_5: Optimize Google Business Profile and local search presence.

recommended_services.website_improvements: Professional website optimization and performance improvements.
recommended_services.seo_improvements: Basic SEO optimization to improve search rankings.
recommended_services.branding_improvements: Develop a stronger and more consistent brand identity.
recommended_services.social_media_improvements: Create consistent social media content to improve engagement.
recommended_services.google_business_profile_optimization: Set up and optimize Google Business Profile for better local visibility.
recommended_services.content_marketing: Develop educational and promotional content to build authority.
recommended_services.email_marketing: Engage customers through email campaigns and newsletters.
recommended_services.automation_opportunities: Implement AI chatbot, AI voice support, and customer communication automation.

roadmap_30_60_90.30_days: Optimize the website, improve basic SEO, set up Google Business Profile, and establish a social media content plan.
roadmap_30_60_90.60_days: Publish consistent content, strengthen branding, improve search rankings, and increase customer engagement.
roadmap_30_60_90.90_days: Implement automation, monitor performance analytics, optimize lead generation, and continue scaling digital marketing efforts.

recommended_plan.why_this_plan_was_selected: The Basic Plan provides the essential digital services most businesses need to establish a professional online presence and improve customer engagement while remaining affordable.
recommended_plan.which_audit_findings_influenced_the_deci: The recommendation is based on common business needs including website improvement, SEO optimization, social media consistency, customer communication, and local business visibility.
recommended_plan.features_included_in_the_plan: Website (Template), 3 Social Media Posts Per Month, 1 Reel Per Month, AI Chatbot + Voice Support, Basic SEO Optimization, Google Business Profile Setup
recommended_plan.expected_business_outcome: Establish a stronger online presence, improve customer communication, increase local visibility, and create a solid foundation for future digital growth.
recommended_plan.expected_growth_impact: Improved online credibility, increased customer inquiries, better search visibility, stronger brand awareness, and higher engagement across digital channels.
recommended_plan.why_other_plans_were_not_recommended: This report serves as a general fallback assessment. The Basic Plan is recommended as the most suitable starting point before considering more advanced digital marketing services.
